title: Italian HACCP Regional Regulation Entry
description: Schema for HACCP food-safety operator training requirements per Italian region (Reg. CE 852/2004 + regional adaptation).

regione.title: Regione
regione.description: Name of the Italian region whose HACCP regulation is described.

riferimentoNormativo.title: Riferimento normativo
riferimentoNormativo.description: Regional law, decree, or deliberation establishing HACCP training requirements (e.g., 'D.G.R. Lombardia n. X/1105/2013').

durataOreBase.title: Durata ore corso base
durataOreBase.description: Required duration in hours for the base HACCP training course.

durataOreAggiornamento.title: Durata ore corso aggiornamento
durataOreAggiornamento.description: Required duration in hours for the periodic refresher (aggiornamento) HACCP course.

validitaAnni.title: Validità in anni
validitaAnni.description: Validity period of the HACCP certification in years before refresher training is required.

modalitaAmmesse.title: Modalità formative ammesse
modalitaAmmesse.description: Training delivery modes permitted by the regional regulation.

categorieOperatori.title: Categorie di operatori
categorieOperatori.description: Operator categories addressed by the regulation (e.g., 'responsabile industria alimentare', 'addetto manipolazione alimenti').
